violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the milk and egg refrigerators have an accumulation of mold, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The shelving and mats in the refrigerators were observed with an excess of debris. Shelving and mats that can not be cleaned must be replaced. Establishment is to keep product in other refrigerator until coolers have been professionally cleaned for mold removal. Establishment is to send photos of completed work to RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The ceiling tile by the air condition vent is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the milk and egg refrigerators have an accumulation of mold, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The shelving and mats in the refrigerators were observed with an excess of debris. Shelving and mats that can not be cleaned must be replaced. Establishment is to move product to other refrigerator until coolers have been professionally cleaned for mold removal. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The ceiling tiles in the establishment were observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2025

The air conditioning vents in the establishment were observed with an accumulation of mold, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2025
